headline: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Nvidia, Amazon, Alphabet, Microsoft, Oracle, Alibaba and AMD
summary: Nvidia slips 6% after blowout Q4 as AI spending fears grow, but $78B revenue guidance and rising EPS estimates suggest the dip may not last.

headline: Semantic Web Market Research Report 2025-2030: Semantic AI Convergence Unlocks Real-Time Analytics, Autonomous Systems and Intelligent Automation
summary: The global semantic web market is set to expand from USD 2.71 billion in 2025 to USD 7.73 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 23.3%. This growth is fueled by enterprises adopting structured data frameworks to enhance interoperability and AI-driven analytics, motivated by regulatory compliance in sectors like finance and healthcare. With cloud-based graph management driving easier access to semantic technologies, businesses are increasingly embracing ontology alignment and contextual data tagging. Nort

headline: $81.04 Bn Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) Markets - Global Forecast to 2030 with IBM, Cisco, AWS, Google, Microsoft, Oracle, HPE, Intel, Hitachi, and SAP Leading
summary: The global AIoT market is projected to grow from USD 25.44 billion in 2025 to USD 81.04 billion by 2030, driven by the integration of AI and IoT, enhancing real-time analytics. Key growth factors include 5G rollout, edge computing advancements, and low-cost sensors. Smart city initiatives and Industry 4.0 are accelerating demand, though challenges like data security and implementation costs persist. Asia-Pacific is expected to lead in growth. headline: Oracle Lawsuits Test AI Infrastructure Story And Investor Risk Assumptions
summary: Multiple class action lawsuits allege Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) misled investors about its AI infrastructure strategy and data center capabilities. Filings highlight concerns around heavy AI related capital spending, debt funded expansion, and concentration risk tied to large customers such as OpenAI. Plaintiffs claim Oracle did not fully communicate potential risks linked to its AI infrastructure commitments and customer exposure. Oracle is positioned at the center of the race to provide AI ready...
